title: CSPDCL Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 160 Apprentice Posts
description: The Chhattisgarh State Power Distribution Company Limited (CSPDCL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 160 Graduate Apprentices and Diploma Apprentices. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Diploma in Electrical and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the CSPDCL Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline ...
